research.title: From Mock Session to Production Auth: NextAuth.js v5 vs Clerk (Plus Role-Based Authorization)
research.whyTrending: User-requested. Replacing a mock session system with a real auth provider is the #1 gap in server-actions tutorials; NextAuth v5 (Auth.js) vs Clerk is a constantly debated choice, and RBAC (e.g. admins can delete any task) is rarely shown end-to-end.
